case_title: MUI BAO SU VS. SAN BRUNO SUPERMARKET

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN BRUNO SUPERMARKET
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SU, MUI BAO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SU, MUI BAO AS TO DEFENDANT SAN BRUNO SUPERMARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $45.00) SERVED SEP-28-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN BRUNO SUPERMARKET

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOE LIEN---GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---JOYCE SU. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SU, MUI BAO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN BRUNO SUPERMARKET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
